message:
feat(main): add RuntimeProcessRole bootstrap spec and worker thread parsing

Add a structured runtime bootstrap system to main.rs:

  - RuntimeProcessRole enum (Cli, Watch, Web, Robot) classifying the
    ft process by its subcommand
  - RuntimeBootstrapSpec struct carrying the role, named thread prefix,
    and structured startup/shutdown reason codes for telemetry
  - runtime_process_role_for_subcommand(): maps CLI subcommand strings
    to their process role
  - runtime_bootstrap_spec_for_role(): produces the full spec with
    role-specific thread names (ft-cli-runtime, ft-watch-runtime, etc.)
    and reason code pairs
  - parse_runtime_worker_threads(): parses FT_RUNTIME_WORKER_THREADS
    env var with validation (must be positive integer >= 1)

This is the CLI-side foundation for the asupersync runtime bootstrap
path — each subcommand now carries a typed spec that downstream
runtime initialization can consume for structured logging and
thread naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
